notes: Mapping of US refineries to crude grades they are capable of processing. The `context` block is a snapshot of attributes from oil_network.assets at the time the seed was written; the loader ignores it and only persists `refinery_id`, `commodity`, `is_primary`, `source`, `notes`.

refineries.name: PREMCOR REFINING GROUP INC — PORT ARTHUR

grades.notes: Largest US refinery; Saudi Aramco affiliate runs Arab Medium/Heavy imports as the true anchor, with Mars the closest US medium-sour analog moved via Gulf Coast pipelines.
